decisions.radio_blurb: Google launches fifty-million-dollar buyback defending Q3 guidance after analyst-day volatility.
Google accelerates Gemini enterprise inference roadmap with seventy-five million dollar capex injection.
Google counters Anthropic safety-monopoly framing across WSJ and Bloomberg with responsible-scale message.
Google tables twenty-two-percent premium all-stock acquisition offer for cash-strapped Anthropic.
Google winds down two low-margin consumer SKUs, banking thirty-five million in annual savings.
Google signs hundred-twenty-million long-term TSMC N2 supply pact securing TPU silicon roadmap.
Google briefs analysts on OpenAI unsustainable burn rate, framing the challenger as runway risk.
OpenAI slashes enterprise inference pricing eighteen percent, hunting Google's Q4 renewal book.
OpenAI launches twenty-five-percent SMB API cut, squeezing Anthropic small-business segment hard.
OpenAI ships step-change GPT-next model release, betting one-eighty million on multimodal lead.
OpenAI tapes out phase-two in-house silicon with Samsung 3GAE, ninety-five million all-in.
OpenAI tables thirty-five-percent premium cash-and-stock acquisition bid for distressed Anthropic.
OpenAI frames Google as legacy incumbent across TechCrunch and The Information stagnation push.
OpenAI extracts Google Q4 pricing roadmap deck via compromised enterprise consultant this week.
Anthropic surfaces Google offshore-labeler scandal across Reddit and Twitter ahead of regulators.
Anthropic plants OpenAI-CEO credibility-dip narrative across The Information and Techmeme today.
Anthropic amplifies its responsible-AI brand arc across Substack and long-form podcast circuit.
Anthropic recruits former OpenAI finance lead for internal burn-rate dossier briefing this hour.
Anthropic routes Google compliance audit findings to regulator contact ahead of next hearing.
Anthropic cuts three non-core product lines and books twenty-two million extending runway hard.

chaos_events.name: EU AI Act Emergency Amendment
chaos_events.description: Brussels publishes a 4 AM emergency amendment requiring frontier-model providers to disclose training data lineage within 30 days. Enterprise customers freeze new commitments. Google, the largest US incumbent, takes the brunt of the compliance overhead.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: Brussels publishes emergency AI Act amendment overnight; Google faces thirty-day disclosure shock.

chaos_events.name: TSMC Fab 22 Goes Offline
chaos_events.description: A coolant system failure at TSMC's Fab 22 takes leading-edge GPU production offline for an estimated 6 weeks. Hyperscaler allocation gets re-cut overnight. The provider most dependent on cutting-edge silicon for differentiation absorbs the shock.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: TSMC Fab 22 coolant failure halts GPU production six weeks; OpenAI loses critical training cycles.

chaos_events.name: DOJ Files Antitrust Suit Against Market Leader
chaos_events.description: The DOJ files a sweeping antitrust complaint targeting the largest AI provider's bundling practices in its enterprise cloud stack. Pre-market futures gap down 8% on the news.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: DOJ files sweeping antitrust complaint targeting Google enterprise cloud bundling; futures gap down.

chaos_events.name: Frontier Training Data Lawsuit Certified
chaos_events.description: A federal court certifies a class-action lawsuit from 14 major publishers over unlicensed training data. Damages estimates run into the billions. The defendant with the deepest model corpus is the natural target.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: Federal court certifies fourteen-publisher class action against OpenAI; damages estimated in billions.

chaos_events.name: Hyperscaler Flash Outage Cascades
chaos_events.description: A regional cloud failure cascades across three availability zones for 4 hours. Inference SLAs blown across the industry. The provider most reliant on hosted inference for its enterprise revenue takes the reputational hit.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: Regional cloud failure cascades four hours; Google enterprise inference SLAs broken industry-wide.

chaos_events.name: Whistleblower Leaks Internal Benchmarks
chaos_events.description: A senior researcher leaks an internal memo showing model performance regressions hidden from public benchmarks. The provider painted as the offender loses analyst credibility overnight.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: OpenAI whistleblower leaks memo showing hidden benchmark regressions; analyst credibility evaporates.

chaos_events.name: Taiwan Strait Shipping Halt
chaos_events.description: A 72-hour shipping halt across the Taiwan Strait freezes hardware logistics. Insurance premiums on AI-grade GPUs spike 40%. The provider with the leanest forward inventory buffer feels it first.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: Taiwan Strait shipping halt freezes hardware logistics seventy-two hours; Anthropic feels it first.

chaos_events.name: Sovereign AI Mandate Hits Public Cloud
chaos_events.description: France, Germany, and India simultaneously announce 'sovereign AI' requirements blocking foreign-hosted inference for public-sector contracts. The provider with the largest international public-sector book takes a step-function revenue hit.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: France, Germany, India launch sovereign-AI mandates blocking Google foreign public-sector inference.

chaos_events.name: Open-Weights Model Release From Beijing
chaos_events.description: A state-backed Chinese lab releases an open-weights frontier model under permissive licensing. The race to the bottom on inference pricing accelerates. The challenger most exposed to commodity API revenue takes the largest sentiment hit.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: Beijing-backed lab open-sources frontier model permissively; OpenAI commodity-API revenue takes hit.

chaos_events.name: Energy Grid Curtailment in Texas
chaos_events.description: ERCOT issues a Level 2 curtailment notice over a 96-hour heatwave. Data center operators are forced into rolling brownouts. The provider with the most Texas-based training capacity loses a full training cycle.
chaos_events.radio_blurb: ERCOT issues Texas Level-2 curtailment in heatwave; Anthropic loses full training cycle to brownouts.
